title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Typhoid Conjugate Vaccine (Vi-TT) in Endemic Settings v1.0
hero_h2: Typhoid Conjugate Vaccine (Vi-TT) in Children in High-Incidence Endemic Settings

pico.pop: Children aged 9 months to 12-16 years residing in typhoid-endemic settings (TyVAC Malawi: Blantyre; TyVAC Nepal: Lalitpur; TyVAC Bangladesh: Dhaka)
pico.int: Single-dose Vi-tetanus toxoid (Vi-TT) typhoid conjugate vaccine (Typbar-TCV, manufactured by Bharat Biotech)
pico.comp: Single-dose meningococcal-A (MenA) conjugate vaccine -- standardized non-typhoid control with similar reactogenicity
pico.out: Blood-culture confirmed Salmonella Typhi typhoid fever (primary; total person-time over ~12-month follow-up reported as vaccine efficacy)
pico.subgroup: Age (9 mo - 5 y vs 5-12 y vs 12-16 y), sex, urban / peri-urban setting, baseline incidence of typhoid

real_data_entries.name: TyVAC Nepal
real_data_entries.group: Cluster-RCT in Lalitpur, Nepal; 9 months - 16 years; Vi-TT vs MenA conjugate vaccine; primary blood-culture confirmed typhoid fever

allOutcomes.title: Blood-culture confirmed typhoid at 12 months (primary, IRR; vaccine efficacy 79.0%)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Shakya M et al. NEJM 2019;381:2209-2218 (TyVAC Nepal Vi-TT cluster RCT).

real_data_entries.name: TyVAC Bangladesh
real_data_entries.group: Cluster-RCT in Dhaka, Bangladesh; 9 months - <16 years; Vi-TT vs MenA conjugate vaccine; primary blood-culture confirmed typhoid fever

allOutcomes.title: Blood-culture confirmed typhoid at 17.1 months (primary, IRR; vaccine efficacy 85.0%)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Qadri F et al. Lancet 2021;398:675-684 (TyVAC Bangladesh Vi-TT cluster RCT).

real_data_entries.name: TyVAC Malawi
real_data_entries.group: Cluster-RCT in Blantyre, Malawi; 9 months - 12 years; Vi-TT vs MenA conjugate vaccine; primary blood-culture confirmed typhoid fever

allOutcomes.title: Blood-culture confirmed typhoid at 18.6 months (primary, IRR; vaccine efficacy 80.7%)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Patel PD et al. NEJM 2021;385:1104-1115 (TyVAC Malawi Vi-TT cluster RCT).
